dq_rules.proposed_action: Deduplicate: keep the last occurrence per employee_id.
Impute missing 'performance_rating' with the department median.
Impute missing 'compensation' with the department median.
Impute missing 'engagement_score' with the department median.

business_rules.name: tenure_calculation
business_rules.description: Compute tenure_years as (exit_date or today) minus hire_date, in years.

business_rules.name: high_overtime_threshold
business_rules.description: Flag employees with overtime_hours_per_month > 15 as 'high overtime' for risk-factor analysis.

narrative:
**Engineering** has the highest top-performer attrition rate at 11.7% (7 of 60 top performers), driven primarily by elevated overtime before exit; low engagement score prior to exit.

Departments ranked by risk: Engineering (11.7%). Recommend prioritizing a retention review for the top-ranked department(s) before the next review cycle.
